Petition For Declatory Relief Re No Contest Clause
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for Sonya Badasov (Petitioner).

Mr. Boessenecker stated that there were no objections. The Court found that it was not a violation of the no contest clause and granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Bonner.
